decisions.summary: Return 202 immediately for graceful restart and perform stop/relaunch async. 30s blocking HTTP handler would violate no-execsync-server rule and freeze the dashboard.
Restart creates a fresh session (no resumeSessionId), distinct from resume which continues existing session. buildAgentLaunchConfig supports both modes.
resumeAgent baseCommand: 'claude' is correct even for non-Anthropic models because ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL proxy handles routing. No latent bug to fix.
restart-all updated to call restartAgent() directly instead of POST /api/agents, preserving agent state rather than recreating.

hazards.summary: RestartFromPlanButton already exists and does branch reset — new restart UI must not collide names
hazards.mitigation: Use 'Restart Agent' label, add to ZoneActionStrip as separate action

hazards.summary: restart-all semantics change from fresh spawn to in-place restart
hazards.mitigation: Preserves agentState, workspace, beads — more correct behavior

hazards.summary: switch-model endpoint already exists — restart with model should compose with or subsume it
hazards.mitigation: Restart endpoint handles model switch + restart atomically

resumePoint.description: Bead workspace-3c9 complete. Next: workspace-hwq — add POST /api/agents/:id/restart endpoint and update restart-all route.

beadsMapping.workspace-3c9: Add restartAgent function and model override to resumeAgent
beadsMapping.workspace-hwq: Add POST /api/agents/:id/restart endpoint and update restart-all
beadsMapping.workspace-487: Dashboard restart UI with model selector

sessionHistory.note: Fresh start. Read PRD, explored spawnAgent/resumeAgent/routes/frontend. Identified duplication and design decisions. Created 4 beads.
